Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

The motion to approve settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health & Safety Code.

Order and judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/NL)

The motion to approve settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health & Safety Code.
